arts.ttl: Everton to appoint Leeds' Kinnear as chief executive
arts.sum: Everton will appoint Angus Kinnear as their new chief executive, with the Leeds United CEO beginning the role on 1 June.

arts.ttl: Team News: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs. Everton injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Wolverhampton Wanderers and Everton.

arts.ttl: Everton usher in ‘sporting leadership team’ era with Leeds CEO set to arrive
arts.sum: Leadership team to replace director of football model Leeds CEO Angus Kinnear will head to Everton in June Everton have announced several changes to how the club will be run under The Friedkin Group, with Angus Kinnear arriving as CEO from Leeds and Kevin Thelwell leaving as director of football when his contract expires this summer. Everton’s new owners intend to end the director of football model and transition to a wider “sporting leadership team”. Thelwell has been director of football since 2022 and helped steer the club through a turbulent period under Farhad Moshiri, including two points deductions and serious financial constraints, but will leave at the end of the season. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: 'The right people' - Everton £350m deal draws line under years of drama that could have ended very differently

arts.ttl: Boost for Wolves as player steps up injury recovery – Almost ready to return to training
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers could soon be set for a boost, with Enso Gonzalez ready to return to first team training. That’s according to journalist Christian Martin, who reports that Gonzalez is set for a return and will flourish for the club moving forwards. arts.ttl: Angus Kinnear named new Everton CEO as Kevin Thelwell and Richard Kenyon departures confirmed
arts.sum: The Friedkin Group have confirmed the departures of director of football Kevin Thelwell and chief commercial and communications officer Richard Kenyon and the appointment of Leeds United CEO Angus Kinnear

arts.ttl: Everton to appoint Leeds' Kinnear as chief executive
arts.sum: Everton will appoint Angus Kinnear as their new chief executive, with the Leeds United CEO beginning his role on 1 June.
